message:
fix(runtime): ROLE command returns actual replication offset (was hardcoded 0)

The ROLE command for master mode was returning Integer(0) as the
replication offset instead of the actual primary_offset. This broke
any client or monitoring tool that uses ROLE to determine replication
position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
